name: brigade
description: Brigade: a parallel dev-team fleet for Claude Code — board-first sessions against Notion, ClickUp, Obsidian vault boards, or local markdown.

plugins.name: brigade
plugins.description: Parallel dev fleet planner: board-first sessions, design swag, tiny disjoint work items, haiku cooks in worktrees, adversarial review gate, analyst retros. Three service tiers set model spend per dish.
